title: Executive Order No. 410, s. 2005
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 410

DECLARING AND DELINEATING THE LUBANG ISLAND PORT ZONE UNDER THE ADMINISTRATIVE JURISDICTION OF THE PHILIPPINE PORTS AUTHORITY

WHEREAS , the Port of Lubang Island, Barangay Tilik, Municipality of Lubang, Occidental Mindoro serves as the primary link of trade and commerce, and of the people of Lubang Island, comprised of the municipalities of Lubang and Looc, to mainland Luzon, Mindoro and Palawan;

WHEREAS , the port is vital to the socio-economic development of the two island municipalities in Lubang Island in particular and of the province in general;

WHEREAS , there is a need to expand the Port of Lubang Island for planning purposes to accommodate projected increases in port traffic and to program the development of the necessary port facilities to support the demands of the shipping trade within the region.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Philippines by virtue of the power vested in me by law, do hereby order:

SECTION 1. The territorial jurisdiction of the Port of Lubang Island, Barangay Tilik, Municipality of Lubang, Occidental Mindoro is hereby delineated and established and particularly described as follows:

“Beginning at point marked 1 on the plan, thence to point 2 at a distance of 53.76 m. with bearing N 65º 31′ W, thence to point 3 at a distance of 70.89 m. with bearing N 54º 59′ W, thence to point 4 at a distance of 55.38 m. with bearing N 35º 54′ W, thence to point 5 at a distance of 64.44 m. with bearing N 22º 49′ W, thence to point 6 at a distance of 35.15 m. with bearing N 49º 58′ W, thence to point 7 at a distance of 66.01 m. with bearing N 31º 12′ W, thence to point 8 at a distance of 58.22 m. with bearing N 19º 17′ W, thence to point 9 at a distance of 106.68 m. with bearing N 07º 15′ W, thence to point 10 at a distance of 76.95 m. with bearing N 12º 13′ E, thence to point 11 at a distance of 40.89 m. with bearing N 17º 11′ E, thence to point 12 at a distance of 20.86 m. with bearing N 73º 13′ E, thence to point 13 at a distance of 19.29 m. with bearing N 07º 41′ E, thence to point 14 at a distance of 15.14 m. with bearing N 71º 04′ E, thence to point 15 at a distance of 28.99 m. with bearing N 34º 10′ E, thence to point 16 at a distance of 26.13 m. with bearing N 08º 02′ E, thence to point 17 at a distance of 17.31 m. with bearing N 89º 14′ E, thence to point 18 at a distance of 13.02 m. with bearing N 07º 54′ E, thence to point 19 at a distance of 18.57 m. with bearing N 17º 49′ W, thence to point 20 at a distance of 36.15 m. with bearing N 03º 55′ E, thence to point 21 at a distance of 41.79 m. with bearing N 16º 27′ E, thence to point 22 at a distance of 27.24 m. with bearing N 42º 44′ W, thence to point 23 at a distance of 27.14 m. with bearing N 35º 19′ W, thence to point 24 at a distance of 115.06 m. with bearing N 27º 39′ W, thence to point 25 at a distance of 19.55 m. with bearing N 42º 08′ W, thence to point 26 at a distance of 61.71 m. with bearing N 28º 27′ W, thence to point 27 at a distance of 126.16 m. with bearing N 34º 28′ W, thence to point 28 at a distance of 175.36 m. with bearing N 48º 23′ W, thence to point 29 at a distance of 170.35 m. with bearing N 49º 24′ W, thence to point 30 at a distance of 54.62 m. with bearing N 48º 34′ W, thence to point 31 at a distance of 113.77 m. with bearing N 39º 37′ W, thence to point 32 at a distance of 15,000 m. with bearing N 33º 37′ E, thence to point 33 at a distance of 1,553.47 m. with bearing S 27º 39′ E, thence to point 1, the S 33º 37′ W, the total area comprising of 20,337,876.87 square meter more or less.

SEC. 2. The Lubang Island Port Zone, as delineated and established, is hereby placed under the administration of the Philippine Ports Authority, which shall, consistent with the regional industrial plans of the Government, implement a program for the proper zoning, planning, development and utilization of the port.

SEC. 3. All other orders, proclamations and issuances or portions thereof, which are inconsistent with this Executive Order, are hereby repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 4. This Order shall take effect immediately.

DONE in the City of Manila, this 7th day of March, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Five.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO President of the Philippines

By the President:

(Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

Source: Malacañang Records Office

Office of the President of the Philippines. (2005). [Executive Order Nos. : 401-500]. Manila : Malacañang Records Office.
